---
name: Research question
about: Open a conceptual or architectural question for public discussion
labels: discussion
---

## Question

State the research question clearly.

## Why this question matters

Explain why this question matters for Being's evolution.

## Current understanding

Summarize the current state of the repository relevant to this question.

## Possible directions

List any candidate answers, interpretations, or experiments.

## What would count as progress

Describe what kind of evidence, experiment, or implementation would move this question forward.

## References

Link relevant files, protocols, field notes, or prior issues.
